creator: des@des.no
text:
I work almost exclusively on amd64.  I usually don't even test on i386
until after I've committed the updated port.

I will need a copy of your make.conf and ports.conf, the output from
'uname -a', and a complete log of a failed build.

DES
--=20
Dag-Erling Sm=C3=B8rgrav - des@des.no
